nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省
nodes.summary: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括棕头草雁、Red-and-white crake、查科林鴞等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Brown-chested martin
nodes.summary: Brown-chested martin（Brown-chested martin，学名 Progne tapera），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于拉潘帕省、布宜诺斯艾利斯省，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 拉潘帕省
nodes.summary: 拉潘帕省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括红腿叫鹤、Southern beardless tyrannulet、Bearded tachuri等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Panama and throughout South America east of the Andes as far south as La Pampa and Buenos Aires provinces in Argentina. The brown-chested martin inhabits semi-open to open landscapes such as grasslands, cultivated areas, clearings in forest, and human settlements

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Panama and throughout South America east of the Andes as far south as La Pampa and Buenos Aires provinces in Argentina. The brown-chested martin inhabits semi-open to open landscapes such as grasslands, cultivated areas, clearings in forest, and human settlements

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in Panama and throughout South America east of the Andes as far south as La Pampa and Buenos Aires provinces in Argentina. The brown-chested martin inhabits semi-open to open landscapes such as grasslands, cultivated areas, clearings in forest, and human settlements
